purpose: RADE golden DECODE fixture — replay via flex-sim as RX; AE's RADE decoder should recover the sentence (intelligibility pass/fail).
kind: captured artefact (NOT regenerable without the capture rig — commit it)
sentence_text: The birch canoe slid on the smooth planks.
source_speech: rade_src_s0_david_r0_16k.wav (deterministic SAPI: voice David, rate 0, 16 kHz mono)

content_check.verdict: sustained RADE modem signal (real speech encoded)

capture_notes: RADE TX input must be the PC/DAX source (set mic source to PC in AE), NOT a hardware mic.
RADE encodes host-side: Tap E is written before the radio, so NO real RF is required to capture.
build/rade_taps/ must exist first — AE's writeWavFloat does not create it.
Source audio fed in via Audacity -> CABLE Input (VB-Audio) -> CABLE Output -> AE PC mic.
Clip depends on the RADE encoder version — re-capture if the AE radae vendor changes (hence the SHA in the name).
replay: flex-sim streams this as 24k-stereo RX audio (matches its audio path); AE in RADE RX should decode the sentence.
